title: Formation / Pace Lap
prompt: Warming everything up. Running behind the leader, building temperature in the tyres and brakes for what's coming. One more lap.

title: Race Start
prompt: Lights out. The season starts right now and the next few laps will set the tone for the whole race.

title: Big Save
prompt: Full rotation. You can feel every bit of it through the wheel trying to communicate what just happened. Full correction needed.

title: Position Lost
prompt: {behind} found a way through. This is where the race either falls apart or I dig in and fix it. Chase it down.

title: Position Gained
prompt: Got through. The car had the pace and the moment was right — that's how passes should feel. Next target.

title: Yellow Flag
prompt: Caution flag. Something happened and the race has paused itself — this changes the calculation completely.

title: Position Gained
prompt: Got through. That was the opportunity and you took it cleanly — now capitalize on it. Move ahead.

title: Personal Best Lap
prompt: New PB. The lap did what it needed to do — clean, committed, no mistakes where it mattered. There's more.
